dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
Conclave Screen Share
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
XPC!
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
group.com.acmvit.conclave.screenshare
Conclave uses the camera so you can turn on your video in a meeting.
Conclave can include microphone audio when you share your screen in a meeting.
Conclave uses Bluetooth so meeting audio can route through supported headphones and speakers.
Conclave uses Bluetooth so meeting audio can route through supported headphones and speakers.
Conclave uses the local network to connect meeting audio, video, and screen sharing reliably.
Conclave uses screen capture so you can share your screen in a meeting.
Conclave uses photo library access only when you choose an image from your library.
Conclave saves images to your photo library only when you choose to save them.
Conclave uses your location only when you explicitly choose to share it.
Conclave uses background location only while a location-sharing action you started remains active.
Conclave uses background location only while a location-sharing action you started remains active.
Conclave uses precise location only when you explicitly choose to share your current location in a meeting.
Conclave uses Face ID only when you choose biometric verification for account access.
Conclave uses contacts only when you choose to select someone to invite to a meeting.
Conclave uses calendar access only when you choose to create or view meeting calendar events.
Conclave uses calendar access only when you choose to create or view meeting calendar events.
Conclave can add meeting events to your calendar only when you choose to save them.
Conclave uses reminders only when you choose to create a meeting reminder.
Conclave uses reminders only when you choose to create a meeting reminder.
Conclave accesses files in Documents only when you choose a file to share or attach in a meeting.
Conclave accesses files in Downloads only when you choose a file to share or attach in a meeting.
Conclave accesses files on the Desktop only when you choose a file to share or attach in a meeting.
Conclave accesses network volumes only when you choose a file from one to share or attach in a meeting.
Conclave accesses removable volumes only when you choose a file from one to share or attach in a meeting.
Conclave uses speech recognition only when you choose a meeting voice feature such as transcription.
Conclave uses device motion only when needed to keep meeting video oriented correctly.
Conclave does not track you across apps or websites.
Conclave uses NFC only when you choose an NFC-based join or sharing action.
Conclave uses media library access only when you choose media to share in a meeting.
Conclave uses nearby interaction only when you choose a nearby-device meeting action.
Conclave uses video subscriber account access only when you choose an account-based video feature.
Conclave uses HomeKit only when you choose a home-device meeting action.
Conclave uses Game Center friends only when you choose to invite them to a meeting.
Conclave uses health data only when you explicitly choose a health-sharing action.
Conclave updates health data only when you explicitly choose a health-sharing action.
com.apple.broadcast-services-upload
$(PRODUCT_MODULE_NAME).SampleHandler
RPBroadcastProcessModeSampleBuffer
